item.title: Aane Wala Pal Jaane Wala Hai
Chura Liya Hai Tumne Jo Dil Ko
Dil Kya Kare Jab Kisi Se Pyaar Ho Jaye
Ek Din Bik Jayega (Mati Ke Mol)
Ek Ladki Ko Dekha To Aisa Laga
Gum Hai Kisi Ke Pyar Mein
Hum Kis Gali Ja Rahen Hain
Kisi Ki Muskurahaton Pe Ho Nisar
Kora Kagaz Tha Yeh Man Mera
Mera Dil Bhi Kitna Pagal Hai
Meri Jhopdi Ke Bhag Aaj Khul Jayenge
Patriotic Songs Mashup
item.description: Songs: Jahaan se Achchha, Aye Mere Watan k Logon, Jan Gan Man

item.title: Raja Ko Rani Se Pyaar Ho Gaya
Saawan Ka Mahina Pawan Kare Shor
Tera Mujhse Hai Pehle Ka Naata Koi
Tujhe Dekha To Yeh Jaana Sanam
Tujhe Dekha To Yeh Jaana Sanam
Tujhe Dekha To Yeh Jana Sanam
Yeh Mera Dil Yaar Ka Diwana
Zindagi Ke Safar Mein Guzar Jaate Hain Jo Maqam
